videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição Imagine uma partida de esgrima em que logo após o reinício, um dos atletas se inclina para a frente e oferece a própria cabeça ao adversário. Mas por que alguém faria isso? Esse momento incrível aconteceu durante as quartas de final da Copa do Mundo de 2025, quando o exgrimista americano Colin Hitcock enfrentou o sul-coreano Ouk em uma batalha intensa. Ambos estavam se esforçando ao máximo. Em determinado momento, o placar estava empatado em 9 a 9. O Zanguk lançou um ataque limpo e acertou claramente o capacete de Hitcock. Mas estranhamente o sensor de pontuação não registrou o golpe. Os árbitros não tiveram escolha a não ser reiniciar a partida. Momentos depois, exatamente a mesma coisa aconteceu novamente. Outro golpe claro no capacete. E mais uma vez nenhum sinal do sensor. Até Hitcock percebeu que algo não estava certo e sugeriu que os oficiais verificassem o equipamento. Após a inspeção, o resultado foi surpreendente. O sistema mostrava que o sensor estava funcionando normalmente, sem qualquer indício de erro. A partida precisava continuar. Mas então, algo inacreditável aconteceu no momento em que o árbitro sinalizou o reinício, Hitcock imediatamente se inclinou para a frente e ofereceu a cabeça a Ozanguk. Ele estava intencionalmente permitindo que o adversário marcasse o ponto que deveria ter sido contado antes.

A The answer is a definite no. You already know that. But today, it looks like Nicolas found someone. The problem is, maybe his new girlfriend is n't a good person. Hey guys, it 's so hot, perfect day to have some ice cream. That 's why I came here to my favorite ice cream shop. But I have to be really quick, because today I have a recording scheduled with Rinaldinho, man. And for me, ice cream has to be in a cone. Let me choose ... I think I 'll go with vanilla. Ah, now that 's more like it. Wow, this is delicious. Oh man, I ca n't believe you dropped the only ice cream I had. Oh, I 'm so sorry, I was just walking, I did n't even see you. N-no, no, it 's fine here, okay? Look, it 's nothing here. Look, you can ... You can still ... again, this is just too good, you know? Are you sure? I 'll pay you back. Another ice cream. No, but w-wait, you want to buy one for me? Although this ice cream ca n't really be ... I accept. You have n't even told me, have you? What 's your name? Ah, ah, ah, my name is Cascade. Nicolas, Nicolas, that 's my name. I 'm Paty. What was the ice cream you were having again? Well, anyway, go get your very favorite. Oh, it was, it was pineapple, but ... Thank you, really. Ah, but look, you really did n't have to pay for the ice cream, I could 've bought another one. No, I insisted, I was walking, got distracted, and dropped your ice cream. Oh, but you did n't have to. By the way, do you always come here? Not that often. But good thing I came today, right? Good thing, I mean, I ... No, no, it is really true, ice cream. And your girlfriend, does n't she get jealous of you coming ... I do n't know, like, having ice cream alone, no. Oh, so, I do n't have a girlfriend. You do n't have a girlfriend? Wow, that 's strange, you 're so handsome. Yeah, you know how people just do n't have good taste. But what about you? Are you dating anyone? No, I am not, but I actually really wish I was, you know? Me too, seriously. Wow, that 's ... Wow, I 'm just stretching here. Wow, how lucky that I came to get ice cream today, right? Hey Heraldinho, Nico is taking too long for the shoot. He is really late. Yeah, man, he should have arrived already. I 'm going to call him because he 's never this late. Oh my god. telephone. Sorry, okay? Wow, my friend is calling me to record. Hold on a minute, okay? Oh, no You need n't stay. Hello? Nicolas, where are you, man? We 'd scheduled to record, but you 're super late. Ah, Reinaldinho, ca n't we postpone this recording? I 'm on a ... date. What, a date, Nicolas? Work comes first. We 've got to record a video for the audience. Ah, okay, okay, fine. Looks like he 's joking around. Nicolas, asking if there 's any way to reschedule the recording because he was on a date. A date? What do you mean? I did n't get it either. Coming from Nicolas, I doubt it 's anything serious. Look, my friend just called me for a recording, but can we set up to meet later? Give me your phone number. I 'll give it to you, but just call me, okay? Of course, of course I 'll call, I 'll text you, okay? Bye, bye. My phone, goodbye for now. Goodbye, you silly, the connection is starting to drop. No, my plan is fine. Oh, Paty, I barely know you, but ... I think I am starting to fall for you a little bit. Well, Reinaldo, I am right here. So, where exactly have you been, Nicolas? Oh, Reinaldinho, I really think I 'm falling in love. In love? With who? No. It 's none of your business. Anyway, I 'll explain it to him later. We 're already late for the shoot, let 's focus and you two can talk later, okay? One week later ... Guys, guys, guys, I— I do n't know, I need to tell you something, it 's urgent. What is it, Nicolas? I think that ... I 'm going to start dating, I 'm going to start dating— Dating ... Nicolas, I told you I do n't want to date you. And who said I was talking to you, princess? I 've got another girlfriend, and it 's not you, Jessie. Another girlfriend? And it 's not me? Who is she, Nicolas? Spit it out already. Wow, Jessie, are you starting to get jealous now? I just ca n't believe this. Well, you better believe it, okay? Because I honestly think I 've found the right person for my life. Alright then, I 'm happy for you. In fact, you could invite her here to introduce her to us. Good idea, Naldinho. I want to see this, Nicolas. I bet no one will show up. Ah, so you do n't believe me? If you want, I 'll call her right here in front of you. Then call her, Nicolas. We want to see it to believe it. Ah, I guess I 'll have to call her then, since you guys do n't believe me. What is it? Hi, love, hi? Nick, how are you? All good? Hey, let me ask you something, my friends over here do n't believe that we 're actually dating, did you know that? It 's crazy, right? What? Why not? Because they 've never seen you in person, actually ... Ah ... You yourself wo n't come here so we can do something with them Oh no Of course, absolutely, I would definitely love to. Okay, so it 's settled, they 're doubting that we 're dating. Wow, that is so silly, I mean to say ... No, look ... What? No. Anyway. Okay, just come. You can come. Eight thirty, eight thirty. You look beautiful, do n't you? Say hi to Jess here. Hi, Jess. Here you go, Jess. See, Jess? See, Jess? Wow, it feels like I 'm having déjà vu. It sounds like I 've heard that voice before. Impossible Larissa You do n't even know her. Alright Nicolas, stay there with your new little girlfriend. Here 's the thing, Nicolas. You invited your girlfriend to come over to my house, but there 's a problem. We kind of did n't prepare anything and there 's nothing to do here. Okay, what if we watched a movie? Oh no Nick, that 's too romantic. What if we went for a drive in mine? My Beetle. Oh, is n't it really cramped and smelly? Alright, so what do you guys think we should do? How about we have a really tasty burger night? Good idea, Lari, I 'll help you. Uh, Wonderful. So here 's what I 'll do: I 'll go pick her up and you guys take care of the rest, okay? Okay, I 'm going, okay, I 'm going, I 'm going, do n't worry. Oh, I 'm so happy, I 'm finally dating. Wait, I 've never gotten past this stage. Oh, but let 's go. Jess, I 've got all the ingredients here to start making the sandwiches. I think you can set the table. I think it 's great. Okay, but before that, that thing with Nicolas and the girl was really weird, right? Until yesterday, he liked you. Yeah, I think that ... Never mind Forget it, I 'll go set the table. Ya Go ahead. Meanwhile, I 'll finish making the sandwiches here. I think the table is looking really nice. At this rate, Nicolas 's new girlfriend might even like us. There, put it on that end over there, and I 'll put it on this one, so it looks really symmetrical. But we nailed the table. I 'll eat and you 're at the table. The food smells really good. But wait, Jess. We do n't even have any cold soda or any tasty dessert. What do we do now? Oh, you 're right, we really do n't. I 'll be right back. Hinaldinho, we 've already set up the whole table. But there 's no dessert or soda. Oh man, Jess. Do we have time? I can go and buy it. That 's exactly why I came here. You 'd better go now, because Nicolas set it for eight. You 'll have time to go and get back. Okay, I 'll prioritize sweets, the ones you buy, and soda. I 'll be right back. Go. ahead. I just got to the supermarket and, since we do n't have much time, there wo n't be many options. I 'm heading right to this area with all the sweets and candies, and I 'll pick up some treats from here. So, I do n't know, I thought about grabbing some gummy candies like these here. I 'll see if I get maybe some other kind of chocolate. Something that 's already ready, just to put on the table and serve. Hey, Hey, Patricia, listen, I am going to be honest with you. I do n't know what we 're going to do there today, because nobody was expecting to go out. Today, right? But let 's go, because I have no idea either. I 'm anxious. No, it 'll be great. What 's the worst? By the way, do you want to take a ride in the Beetle later? The Beetle? This car is better. Alright. We 're almost there, okay? It 's right over there. And I think you 're going to love it, my friends. They 're really cool. Wow, I know. Let me ask you, have you ever had such a cool boyfriend before? Like me? No, it 's the first time I 've ever dated. You Can you believe it? Really? Me too. I am so sorry, it is just ... Okay, we 're almost there. and ... Do n't mind if Jess is acting a little weird, okay? She 's kind of crazy, really. No, not at all. Well, girls, I rushed and grabbed everything I could bring in the time I had. Here 's the soda and the sweets, which I put in a bowl to look nicer. I also brought other packaged candies, plus marshmallows and chocolate to make fondue if you want. Paty, welcome. This is Denaldinho 's house, but they must be around here somewhere. Come with me, I 'll show you. Guys, I 'd like you to meet Paty, my girlfriend. Paty? From school days? Oh no, please, anyone else but Paty. What do you mean? What kind of welcome is this? Is this how you treat my girlfriend? Do you know him from somewhere? Ah, I do n't think so. Uh, no, Nicolas likes to get himself a girlfriend, when he ... It 's Paty the Bully. Listen, guys, let 's talk for a minute. Guys, here 's the thing, it 's obvious that Nicolas does n't know who Paty really is. We need to find a way to tell him who she really is. But how can we do that without ruining his dream of a perfect girlfriend? I got it, guys. I 'll distract her while you tell him. Okay, that works, let 's go. Hey, how are you? Sorry about the welcome. But what do you think about the day to show the house? Well, it could be, but there is n't one. Nicolas, could you please come over here? What is it exactly this time, Reinaldo? Nicolas, listen to me, you really have to break up with her right now. Are you going crazy because your girlfriend is Morgana and mine is a normal person? Of course not, Nicolas. It 's not about her style. See, she was the bully at our old school, you know? And she used to bully me constantly. Oh, Larissa, stop messing around. What did she do to you? Oh, she actually did quite a variety of ... things. Do n't you remember, people getting scared of you when you looked at them at school? Because I remember. It 's kind of a Pinocchio vibe, is n't it? I 'm not liking any of this that you 're saying. And that 's why you should n't be with her. She 's not a good person. That girl, she 's friends with Reinaldo, my bully too. In other words, this girl you say is your girlfriend is much more dangerous than you think. I 've never heard such nonsense in my life. You 're only saying that because you 're jealous. Just because I have my first girlfriend now and I 'm happy, it 's just jealousy from you. Goodbye for now. It 's not jealousy, Nicolas. Wait up. He did n't understand anything. If Nicolas keeps dating Paty, my life is over. So, Paty, this is the studio. This is where the biggest videos from Enaldinho 's Channel are made. This table here is really famous. I 'm sure you 've already seen this set in the videos. Wow, that 's really cool, you know? But anyway, let 's check out the next room. Yeah, sure. Yeah, let 's go. Oops. Ah, Paty, Paty. I was chatting with the guys over there, but is everything okay? Let 's eat, I 'm starving. Move out! Go ahead, it 's that way. Hey Paty, make yourself at home. I think the guys made a bunch of burgers, there 's soda, there 's juice ... No time to waste, I 'm grabbing a big burger for myself, and those fries, wow, want some? Here, have some. me too these golden french fries look absolutely delicious Babe, I do n't think your friends liked me very much. What? What? Hey, guys. What 's going on? Is that how you treat my girlfriend? Uh ... No, it 's just that I 'm tired and not hungry. Yeah, And while I was making the food, I ended up eating a couple of burgers, so I 'm full. Tell me, where did you two meet? Oh, I 'll tell you. We met at an ice cream shop, I bumped into him, but he was super gentlemanly. We started talking and, I do n't know, guys, it was like love at first sight. Yeah, and we started going out and never stopped. I see. I liked the story. So, now you just really need to tell him how we met, right, Paty? Patrícia Guerra, what story? Which one is Larissa talking about? I thought I recognized your face, yeah ... From back in school. Speaking of which, sorry about anything, okay? I was really, really young and immature. Well, that 's all in the past now, right? Water under the bridge. Water under the bridge, maybe for you. But I remember everything you did. Oh, oh, oh, let 's stop right there, okay? Larissa, do n't start. School days were a long time ago, just forget about it. Paty is obviously a really great person. She ca n't keep holding herself accountable for what she did as a kid. I know, give me a chance to show that I 'm a better person now. I 'd love to be your friend. You know what? I ca n't stand your city. I 'm going to get some water. What 's up with that, Larissa? No, Niki, it 's fine. I 'll take the opportunity to go to the bathroom. Man, I do n't get you guys. It 's tough for me to get a girlfriend, and when I do, you guys act like this? Nicolas, one day you 'll see her true colors. She really is n't the sweet person she pretends to be around you. Oh, Nicolas, seriously, you must be blinded by love. If it were me, I would never do that or lie to you. Yeah, right, Jess? You 're just jealous because now I have a girlfriend and you do n't. But now it 's too late, I 'm going to be with her. I have n't been in this room yet. Hmm ... I wonder whose backpacks these are? It really looks like this one here is Jess 's. And this one is Larissa 's. Actually, I think I just had a really good idea. This is Jess 's moisturizing cream. And this one here, well, let 's see what we have. A gold necklace. That would be a shame, right? If this showed up in Larissa 's backpack. I mean, in Lari 's. Guys, I 'm finally back. Look, guys, I 'm back, but I do n't think I can stay here for long. Girls, I 'm looking at my hand here, you know, it 's really quite dry, do any of you have some moisturizer I could borrow by any chance? Had I any I would n't lend it to you. Everyone calm down, guys, I have some, I 'll get it. Oh, I thought I left the lotion right here. Wait, my lotion is n't here anymore. And ... My gold necklace, where is it? Someone took it, I 'm sure someone took it from my bag. Guys, the gold necklace my grandmother gave me disappeared from my bag, and so did my lotion. What do you mean? That 's not possible, we have to look for it. Calm down, Jessi. We 'll figure this out. Let 's split up and see. If we find her necklace ... I 'll look for it. Here. This is just what we needed. Jessi 's gold necklace disappeared in my house. Things do n't just disappear out of nowhere like that. We have to find it somewhere. Jess might have grabbed a costume to film and could have dropped it somewhere around here. Funny how things started disappearing as soon as that girl showed up. I know the snake is n't here, but you never know, right? What if someone played a little prank and hid it somewhere? Excuse me, Mr. stuffed snake, let me just see if it 's hidden in here. There 's nothing here. Oh, now where could it be? That necklace is really important to me, guys. It has a lot of sentimental value. I ca n't lose it, no matter what. I 'm going to check here in the love shack, just in case someone mixed it up with the recording stuff. I do n't know if the person knows, but that necklace is real gold. And if I lose it, I 'll never forgive myself. I hope some of the guys find it. Dude, I 'm almost absolutely sure that Jessie did n't lose it. It 's definitely at the bottom of her backpack. I 'm not even going to waste time looking in any specific place. Because nobody in this house steals from anyone. But I 'll check the fridge, just so I can say I looked. Oh, necklace. No necklace here in the fridge, huh? Wow. Dang, guys. I did n't find a thing. Me neither. I 'm never going to see my necklace again. Look, guys. I did n't really want to butt in, you know? But back in school, Lari used to take other people 's things. Have you guys checked her backpack yet? What do you mean, Larissa? Are you out of your mind? I never did anything like that. Stop lying. Come on, guys. You know me. I would only look just to ... Just to stir things up, you know? No, if you want, I 'll open my backpack now. I just do n't think that 's necessary. Oh, I believe Paty. Larissa, if you 're sure you did n't take it, show your backpack. I 'm going to get my backpack, prove I did n't do any of that, and prove that this girl is a liar. Well, oh, I see now. I really hope you have a great explanation, Larissa. Look, Jessie, I think it was Paty who put it in my bag. I did n't take any of that. Of course it was n't me. Are you insane? How could you, Larissa, steal from our own friend? Wow, Larissa, I never expected this from you. Guys, but I 'm not a thief. It was n't me. Believe me. You know what I think, Larissa? That you 're old enough to stop trying to blame others. Own up to your mess. Who do you think you are, girl? This is your doing, I 'm sure of it. But it was in your backpack. And another thing, I do n't know this house. This is mine. Now I do n't know who to believe. Obviously it was Larissa, Paty would never do that. Hey, hey, hey, Paty, I 'm sorry, okay? For bringing you here to this house with all these people. Crazy people. Let 's go, let 's go. Look, Jess, I swear it was n't me. Believe me. Ugh, but the thing is, I 've known Larissa for a long time and I know I would never do that. Look, Larissa, I do trust you, okay? We know what Paty is capable of, and if I were you, Jess, I would trust Lari. But it is the truth, Lari would never do that. Oh, guys, thank you for trusting me. The problem now is Nicolas, who 's blinded by love and she 's managing to fool him. That is true. We must open his eyes so he 'll leave that girl, and fast. Look, Paty, I 'm sorry, okay? I did n't know Larissa was involved in that kind of thing, much less tried to frame others. Oh, Nick, it 's okay. I just think you deserve much better friends. Oh, Paty, relax, okay? Do n't be like that. You have to trust me.
